_nota: Jengibre parte 1 (4:23). Transcripción OpenAI. Tiempos del timeline real. Assets propios de jengibre.

beats.setup: Ese pedacito olvidado en la cocina.

gen.name: j1_jengibre_cocina
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary macro of a knobby fresh ginger root piece sitting on a worn wooden kitchen counter, a bit forgotten, natural soft indoor daylight, muted warm colors, realistic imperfect handheld camera angle, slightly tilted, practical documentary look, low-resolution YouTube documentary screenshot look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, person talking, logo, text, cartoon, CGI, 3D, watermark.

gen.name: j1_jengibre_arrugado
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary extreme macro of an old wrinkled shriveled piece of ginger root in a hand, looking ugly and forgotten, natural soft indoor light, muted colors, realistic imperfect handheld camera angle, slightly tilted, low-resolution YouTube documentary screenshot look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, person talking, logo, text, cartoon, CGI, 3D, watermark.

gen.name: j1_jengibre_brote
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary extreme macro of a ginger rhizome with small green-pink sprouting buds starting to grow from its knobs, signs of life, natural soft daylight, muted colors, realistic imperfect handheld camera angle, slightly tilted, low-resolution YouTube documentary screenshot look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, person talking, logo, text, cartoon, CGI, 3D, watermark.

gen.name: j1_jengibre_precio
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary frame of ginger root for sale at a supermarket produce shelf with a small price label, expensive, indoor fluorescent store lighting, muted colors, realistic imperfect handheld camera angle, slightly tilted, low-resolution YouTube documentary screenshot look, not staged, ultra realistic. gen.name: j1_jengibre_mano
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary photo of a weathered hand holding several fresh ginger rhizomes over a garden bed, natural soft outdoor daylight, muted earthy colors, realistic imperfect handheld camera angle, slightly tilted, low-resolution YouTube documentary screenshot look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, person talking, logo, text, cartoon, CGI, 3D, watermark.

beats.kicker: O se pudre en la tierra

gen.name: j1_jengibre_podrido
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary macro of a rotting moldy piece of ginger half-buried in wet dark soil, soft and spoiled, doing nothing, natural daylight, muted dim colors, realistic imperfect handheld camera angle, slightly tilted, low-resolution YouTube documentary screenshot look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, healthy ginger, person talking, logo, text, cartoon, CGI, 3D, watermark.

beats.caption: Los puntos donde nace la planta

gen.name: j1_yemas_macro
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary extreme macro of the surface of a ginger root showing small pointed growth buds (eyes) like little horns poking out, natural soft daylight, muted colors, realistic imperfect handheld camera angle, slightly tilted, low-resolution YouTube documentary screenshot look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, person talking, logo, text, cartoon, CGI, 3D, watermark.

gen.name: d_yemas
gen.prompt: Crear una infografía horizontal 16:9, ilustración hecha a mano profesional, limpia, editorial. Fondo marfil con textura de papel, líneas marrón oscuro, acentos verde oliva y terracota. Dejá LIBRE la esquina superior derecha. Muestra un rizoma de jengibre con flechas señalando varias yemas y, de cada yema, un brote verde naciendo. Texto en español: 'Más yemas = más brotes'. Minimalista, clara, estética botánica vintage premium, papel envejecido.

beats.text: Acá viene lo que *nadie* te cuenta.

slides.title: Le ponen un producto para que no brote

gen.name: d_tratado
gen.prompt: Crear una infografía horizontal 16:9, ilustración hecha a mano profesional, limpia, editorial. Fondo marfil con textura de papel, líneas marrón oscuro, acentos verde oliva y terracota. Dejá LIBRE la esquina superior derecha. Muestra un jengibre de supermercado con un símbolo de spray/producto encima y una yema bloqueada/dormida, indicando que está tratado para no brotar. Texto en español: 'El jengibre del super viene tratado para que NO brote'. Minimalista, clara, estética botánica vintage premium.

steps.title: Remojo de una noche
steps.desc: En un bowl con agua tibia, le saca el producto

steps.title: Envolvé en papel húmedo
steps.desc: Lugar tibio y oscuro, unos días

steps.title: Las yemas se hinchan
steps.desc: Puntitas verdes o rosadas = está vivo

beats.text: Es como darle el *desayuno* a la planta.

slides.title: No para abajo como la zanahoria

gen.name: d_crece_ancho
gen.prompt: Crear una infografía horizontal 16:9, ilustración hecha a mano profesional, limpia, editorial. Fondo marfil con textura de papel, líneas marrón oscuro, acentos verde oliva y terracota. Dejá LIBRE la esquina superior derecha. Comparación lado a lado: a la izquierda una zanahoria creciendo hacia ABAJO (vertical, raíz honda); a la derecha un jengibre creciendo a lo ANCHO horizontal cerca de la superficie. Texto en español: 'El jengibre crece a lo ancho, no hacia abajo'. Minimalista, clara, estética botánica vintage premium.

gen.name: j1_maceta_ancha
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary frame of a wide shallow container (a big low pot or a wooden crate) filled with soil ready to plant ginger, in a backyard, natural soft daylight, muted earthy colors, realistic imperfect handheld camera angle, slightly tilted, low-resolution YouTube documentary screenshot look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, narrow deep pot, person talking, logo, text, cartoon, CGI, 3D, watermark.

steps.title: Cortá en trozos
steps.desc: Cada trozo con al menos 1 o 2 yemas

steps.title: Dejá al aire 1 día
steps.desc: La herida del corte forma costra y no se pudre

steps.title: Tierra rica con abono
steps.desc: El jengibre es comelón, le gusta la tierra rica

steps.title: Yemas para arriba
steps.desc: Acostados, tapá con 2-3 dedos de tierra

gen.name: j1_regar
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary frame of a watering can gently watering freshly planted ginger in a wide container of dark rich soil, water making the soil damp, natural soft daylight, muted earthy colors, realistic imperfect handheld camera angle, slightly tilted, low-resolution YouTube documentary screenshot look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, flooded soil, person talking, logo, text, cartoon, CGI, 3D, watermark.
